article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable rental units at 4281 Grange Street through binding housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14757, which authorizes a legally binding housing agreement with developer Qualex-Landmark Orchard Holdings Ltd. for a 5-storey non-market rental building at 4281 Grange Street. The agreement requires the developer to rent a set number of units at below-market rates to income-qualifying tenants, with those conditions permanently registered on the property title.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review whether your development has similar inclusionary housing obligations.
